stemHtml: You are the pilot of a motorized heavier-than-air aircraft flying under IFR in controlled airspace in VMC. During the flight you notice a sailplane at your 10 o'clock with a converging course. Who has the right of way?

options.a: You, because you are flying under IFR.
options.b: You, because you are on its right.
options.c: You, because you are on its left.
